items.html: But at the second time of each and every Partzuf, there was already one who would raise MAN [Mayin Nukvin]. For AA [Arich Anpin], after he had been corrected through what Atik clarified in order to correct him — of itself, at the first time — now, when Atik returned a second time to a discernment of Zivug [coupling] with his Nukva, Arich is found already corrected, and it is he who raises the MAN to Atik. And in this same order it proceeds through the rest of the degrees.
